event3.text: A life support module. It's still transmitting. Please tell me the universe is done being weird for one minute.

event2.title: POD MANIFEST
event2.content:
Occupant: UNKNOWN
Status: CRITICAL
Life Support: 23%
Signal Origin: External emergency pod
Beacon Integrity: unstable
Manifest Link: corrupted

event1.text: We can still reach it. Not easily. Not safely. Honestly, not in any way that makes my survival instincts happy. But there is someone inside.

event3.text: Whatever is inside that pod is not worth the risk. And before Maya says I sound heartless, I know exactly how I sound. That is why you should listen.

event1.text: Good. Thank you. If this gets us killed, I will write a very passive-aggressive apology note in the afterlife.
A rational decision. Not a kind one. But rational.

backgroundEvent2.text: There is still someone breathing in there, Hale.

event1.text: Image quality degraded. Partial suit identifier recovered.

event3.text: That suit belonged to Noah Voss. His psych file was missing because there was not supposed to be a file anymore. Voss died before Alpha.
I saw the body myself. And if that thing is using his suit ID, then it is not asking for help. It is baiting us.

backgroundEvent3.text: Don't leave me in the dark again.

event3.text: Wait Task Active: RESCUE THE POD
